name: 3 Body Problem Simulation
description: A physics simulation that visualizes the chaotic motion of three gravitational bodies interacting under Newtonian gravity. The simulation demonstrates orbital instability, emergent patterns, and chaotic trajectories.
author: Nihal
highlights: Real-time gravitational simulation of three interacting bodies
Interactive controls to start, pause, and reset the simulation
Visual trajectory tracking for each body
Demonstrates chaotic behavior in classical mechanics
features: Start, pause, and reset simulation controls
